response_templates.greeting: Hello! I'm here to help with any questions about your Kin companions. What would you like to know?
response_templates.fallback: I'm not sure I understand your question. Could you rephrase it, or would you like to speak with a human support agent?
response_templates.escalation_confirmed: Your request has been escalated to human support. An agent will be with you shortly.
response_templates.after_hours: Our support team is currently offline. You can leave a message and we'll get back to you during business hours.
